title: Fun things to do in Mossel Bay
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay has lots to see...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay has lots to see and even more to do. These fun activities will make your staycation an adventure.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay has lots to see and even more to do. These fun activities will make your staycation an adventure."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SkydivingHow about a tandem skydive? Jump from an aircraft and experience the incredible feeling of freefalling and an exhilarating flight over everything the Mossel Bay area has to offer.","html":"Skydiving
How about a tandem skydive? Jump from an aircraft and experience the incredible feeling of freefalling and an exhilarating flight over everything the Mossel Bay area has to offer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zipline","html":"Zipline "},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Mossel Bay Zipline is the longest over-the-ocean zipline in the world."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spanning about 1-100m and reaching a speed of up to 90km/h, the zipline lets you glide over the bay for an adrenaline-fuelled experience.Shark cage divingBeautiful Mossel Bay has an abundant variety of sealife. Shark cage diving will let you see eye to eye with the great whites.","html":"Spanning about 1-100m and reaching a speed of up to 90km/h, the zipline lets you glide over the bay for an adrenaline-fuelled experience.

Shark cage diving
Beautiful Mossel Bay has an abundant variety of sealife. Shark cage diving will let you see eye to eye with the great whites."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Paragliding","html":"Paragliding "},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Based at the heart of the Garden Route, Dolphin Paragliding is the bee's knees in paragliding, with an excellent safety record."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Boat trips","html":"Boat trips "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Romonza Boat Trips offers Seal Island trips, sunset cruises and boat-based whale watching, all presented by qualified guides.Sandboarding","html":"Romonza Boat Trips offers Seal Island trips, sunset cruises and boat-based whale watching, all presented by qualified guides.

Sandboarding "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dragon Dune is the largest and longest sandboard ride in South Africa. Situated on private land at Vleesbaai, this beast provides the ultimate ride on sand, similar to snowboarding.","html":"Dragon Dune is the largest and longest sandboard ride in South Africa. Situated on private land at Vleesbaai, this beast provides the ultimate ride on sand, similar to snowboarding."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Fun things to do in Mossel Bay
